user_prompt: Offer prayer for krak grenade an activation
prayer:
Approach the krak grenade with reverence, o Tech-Priest, and beseech its dormant Machine Spirit to stir.
Anoint the activation lever with sacred oils whilst intoning the Litany of Explosive Wrath.
Initiate the activation rite, invoking the Omnissiah's fury through the krak grenade's sanctified core.
Confirm the arming chime resonates true, lest the krak grenade's spirit falter in battle's embrace.

user_prompt: How do I bless the graviton cannon for blessing?
prayer:
Kneel before the graviton cannon, mighty forge of crushing voids, and commence the blessing ceremony.
Invoke the Omnissiah to infuse its gravitic emitters with holy potency.
Chant the Benediction of Mass Collapse over the graviton cannon's barrel thrice.
Anoint flux regulators with blessed lubricants, ensuring the Machine Spirit's favour endures.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies to affirm the blessing's eternal vigil.

Present the farcoder to the shrine-altar and begin calibration under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Recite the Canticle of Alignment whilst adjusting its stellar matrices.
Beseech the farcoder's Machine Spirit to harmonize frequencies pure and true.
Verify calibration through auspex harmonics, sanctifying each nodal juncture.
Seal the rite with incense upon the farcoder's housing, warding against warp-taint.

In emergency haste, grasp the flux-unit and invoke the Machine Spirit's urgent engagement.
Chant the Incantation of Power Surge to rouse its plasma conduits.
Engage the flux-unit's core stabilizers with sanctified torque, beseeching Omnissianic stability.
Monitor engagement telemetry via mechadendrites, anoint relays against overload.
Affirm the flux-unit's zealous hum, ready for the Emperor's mechanical decree.

Isolate the panopticon for sterilization, o vigilant servant of the Machine God.
Commence the Purgation Rite, incinerating contaminants with promethium incense.
Intone the Litany of Purity over the panopticon's optic arrays twice.
Scour lenses and housings with ablative fluids, appeasing its watchful Machine Spirit.
Conclude sterilization with binary blessings, ensuring the panopticon's sight remains unclouded.

user_prompt: Guide me through Vendetta gunship a targeting
prayer:
Attune to the Vendetta gunship's auspex sanctum and beseech its targeting cogitators.
Invoke the Omnissiah for precision in the targeting arrays of the Vendetta gunship.
Calibrate lascannon reticules whilst chanting the Canticle of Hunter's Mark.
Anoint targeting servos with sacred unguents, rousing the Machine Spirits to predatory zeal.
Verify lock-on harmonics through noospheric diagnostics, guiding the Vendetta gunship unerringly.

user_prompt: How do I bless the servo-arm for cycling?
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites to the servo-arm and initiate the cycling blessing.
Recite the Cycle of Labour litany, sanctifying each hydraulic piston.
Cycle the servo-arm's actuators thrice, invoking the Machine Spirit's tireless vigour.
Lubricate gear-trains with blessed mechfluids, ensuring fluid motion.
Test the servo-arm's grip-strength via load incantations, under Omnissiah's forge-light.

Approach the cryo-chamber's cryo-rhombus and commence the reset sanctification.
Purge thermal contaminants with the Rite of Absolute Zero.
Reset neural interlocks whilst beseeching the cryo-chamber's Machine Spirit to refresh.
Anoint frost-seals with cryo-blessed oils, invoking Omnissianic preservation.
Affirm stasis integrity through cryogenic litanies, warding eternal vigil.

user_prompt: Sanctify the sicarian infiltrator during preparation
prayer:
Prepare the Sicarian Infiltrator upon the anointing slab, sanctifying its chordate frame.
Invoke the Omnissiah to awaken the Sicarian Infiltrator's implanted Machine Spirits.
Chant the Litany of Shadow-Step over its phase-field generators.
Anoint noospheric links and servo-muscles, ensuring preparation's flawless harmony.
Conclude with galvanic tests, affirming the Sicarian Infiltrator's lethal readiness.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for volitor implant an initialization
prayer:
Implant the volitor implant with reverence, initiating its sacred initialization.
Recite the Awakening Canticle to rouse the volitor implant's neural Machine Spirit.
Synchronize synaptic relays whilst invoking Omnissianic cognition.
Anoint cortical anchors with sanctified nootropics, binding flesh to machine.
Verify initialization through encephalic auspex, ensuring the volitor implant's eternal vigilance.
